711 GG0130E1_BTHE_SELF_STRT_CD GG0130E1_BTHE_SELF_STRT_CD GG0130E1 Bathe Self Start Indicator CHAR 1 Indicates the resident's ability to bathe self, including washing, rinsing, and drying self (excludes washing of back and hair) (excludes transferring in/out of tub/shower) at the start of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
 01=Dependent
 02=Substantial/maximal assistance
